'''鈭歞h-d-sh-r''' ('''kadhadsheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joist|joist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-d-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joist|joist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-d-sh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kadhadsheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhadsheroko|thidhadsheroko]] || [[word:jidhadsheroko|jidhadsheroko]] || [[word:shidhadsheroko|shidhadsheroko]] || [[word:kidhadsheroko|kidhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhadsheroko|thuthudhadsheroko]] || [[word:jujudhadsheroko|jujudhadsheroko]] || [[word:shushudhadsheroko|shushudhadsheroko]] || [[word:kukudhadsheroko|kukudhadsheroko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhadsheroko|thudhadsheroko]] || [[word:judhadsheroko|judhadsheroko]] || [[word:shudhadsheroko|shudhadsheroko]] || [[word:kudhadsheroko|kudhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhadsheroko|thedhadsheroko]] || [[word:jedhadsheroko|jedhadsheroko]] || [[word:shedhadsheroko|shedhadsheroko]] || [[word:kedhadsheroko|kedhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhadsheroko|thothodhadsheroko]] || [[word:jojodhadsheroko|jojodhadsheroko]] || [[word:shoshodhadsheroko|shoshodhadsheroko]] || [[word:kokodhadsheroko|kokodhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhadsheroko|thodhadsheroko]] || [[word:jodhadsheroko|jodhadsheroko]] || [[word:shodhadsheroko|shodhadsheroko]] || [[word:kodhadsheroko|kodhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhadsheroko|thodhadsheroko]] || [[word:jodhadsheroko|jodhadsheroko]] || [[word:shodhadsheroko|shodhadsheroko]] || [[word:kodhadsheroko|kodhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhadsheroko|th忙dhadsheroko]] || [[word:j忙dhadsheroko|j忙dhadsheroko]] || [[word:sh忙dhadsheroko|sh忙dhadsheroko]] || [[word:k忙dhadsheroko|k忙dhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhadsheroko|thathadhadsheroko]] || [[word:jajadhadsheroko|jajadhadsheroko]] || [[word:shashadhadsheroko|shashadhadsheroko]] || [[word:kakadhadsheroko|kakadhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhadsheroko|thadhadsheroko]] || [[word:jadhadsheroko|jadhadsheroko]] || [[word:shadhadsheroko|shadhadsheroko]] || [[word:kadhadsheroko|kadhadsheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhadsheroko|thadhadsheroko]] || [[word:jadhadsheroko|jadhadsheroko]] || [[word:shadhadsheroko|shadhadsheroko]] || [[word:kadhadsheroko|kadhadsheroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
